concerns.detail: Insertion contains unsupported character judgment accusing a specific individual of historical cheating in high school physics competitions, which is unrelated to concrete advising practices and constitutes a personal attack.
concerns.excerpt: 怎么没人开团stf zhaowanjia，高中物理竞赛就开始作弊的人，给她混上stf了你们都不吱声啊❗️
